strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Nest.js across multiple senior roles
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows
Proven track record of optimizing performance, scalability, and user experience in high-traffic systems
concerns: Limited direct experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services (only mentioned in passing, no detailed projects)
Recent employment history includes frequent job changes (multiple roles in ~3 years)
No explicit mention of cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) or containerization (Kubernetes) experience in resume

key_factors.factor: Job stability and recent role changes

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack capabilities with TypeScript and modern frameworks, along with relevant AI-agent experience. However, gaps in cloud/Kubernetes experience, limited Kotlin/Java background, and frequent role changes slightly reduce his fit. His open-source contributions and workshops suggest a passion for software craftsmanship.
